title: Plasterers and Stucco Masons
description: Apply interior or exterior plaster, cement, stucco, or similar materials. May also set ornamental plaster.

tasks.text: Cover surfaces such as windows, doors, or sidewalks to protect from splashing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix mortar and plaster to desired consistency or direct workers who perform mixing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apply coats of plaster or stucco to walls, ceilings, or partitions of buildings, using trowels, brushes, or spray guns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine materials needed to complete the job and place orders accordingly.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply weatherproof, decorative coverings to exterior surfaces of buildings, such as by troweling or spraying on coats of stucco.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and prepare surfaces for applications of plaster, cement, stucco, or similar materials, such as by drywall taping.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create decorative textures in finish coat, using brushes or trowels, sand, pebbles, or stones.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply insulation to building exteriors by installing prefabricated insulation systems over existing walls or by covering the outer wall with insulation board, reinforcing mesh, and a base coat.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Rough the undercoat surface with a scratcher so the finish coat will adhere.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install guide wires on exterior surfaces of buildings to indicate thickness of plaster or stucco and nail wire mesh, lath, or similar materials to the outside surface to hold stucco in place.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Spray acoustic materials or texture finish over walls or ceilings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mold or install ornamental plaster pieces, panels, or trim.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
